query:
SELECT projectId, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN level = 'nivel2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nivel2_count,
  MAX(roundIndex) as max_round
FROM questionnaireAnswersV3
GROUP BY projectId
HAVING nivel2_count > 0
ORDER BY nivel2_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
